description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the shared .common:docker-in-docker template (providing a Docker image with Docker-in-Docker service) and the .rules:merge-requests:prepare:ci-image rule set. Define a single stage called prepare. Add a job named "prepare CI image" in the prepare stage that runs the exact script commands: `docker build --pull --no-cache -t ${CI_IMAGE} -f ./.gitlab/ci/Dockerfile ./.gitlab/ci/`, `docker login --username ${CI_REGISTRY_USER} --password ${CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD} ${CI_REGISTRY}`, `docker push ${CI_IMAGE}`, and `docker logout ${CI_REGISTRY}`. The job should only run on merge‑request pipelines as specified by the extended rule. No caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
